title: May 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 2''' is the 122nd day of the year (123rd in leap years). There are 243 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Frank Henson]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Paul Darrow]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[David Ankrum]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Stephen Daldry]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Dwayne Johnson]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Matt Berry]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 62|''Star Wars Weekly'' 62]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 46|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 46]] published.
*[[1992]] – ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' paperback published.
*[[1995]] – [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II audio drama'']] released on Cassette.
*[[1996]] – ''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Rogue Planet]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars: Darth Maul (Dark Horse TPB)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul'' trade paperback]] published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 1|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 1]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 54]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Gauntlet of Death]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.46]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Han and the Rebel Rescue]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Guardians of the Whills (novel)|''Guardians of the Whills'']] published.
*2017 – ''[[Rebel Rising]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 47|''Star Wars'' (2015) 47]] published.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 1|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 1]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The High Republic: Path of Vengeance]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase II Vol. 1 – Balance of the Force]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian — Season One, Part Two]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Flip Pop: Boba Fett]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Flip Pop: Darth Vader]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: Jedi Training]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars Insider 218|''Star Wars Insider'' 218]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[The Spaceport Setback / The Mission Mixup]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
